title: scabiosa tschiliensis f. alpina
intro: Scabiosa tschiliensis f. alpina, also known as Alpine Scabiosa, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). The medicinal properties of Alpine Scabiosa lie in its roots, which contain iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Alpine Scabiosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
